data_source: yfinance; 9 sector SPDRs + SPY/VIX; signal live 2004-2026

strategies.reason: Real drawdown cut (-55%->-23%) but loses Sharpe to VIX-timer/SPY/60-40; the claimed orthogonal forward-return alpha (t=3.77) was overlapping-returns inflation -> honest non-overlapping monthly t=0.46, Newey-West daily t=1.11 (insignificant). No salvage (AR+VIX) beats VIX. Fragility redundant with VIX at monthly horizon.

summary: Cross-domain build #1 (Absorption Ratio, RMT). REJECT: cuts drawdown but redundant with VIX; the orthogonal-alpha claim was an overlapping-returns t-stat artifact (3.77 -> 0.46 honest). Adversarial layer caught the inflation.
infra_idea: add HAC/non-overlapping predictive-regression helper to validation.py
standing_recommendation: voltarget_spy (~76% SPY / 24% cash) remains the only validated strategy
